positive: A minimalist vector illustration of a stylized celestial creature, perhaps a griffin or phoenix, intertwined with crescent moons and shooting stars. The composition should be highly symmetric and centered, featuring clean, flowing lines and sharp silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and gold background. The style should mimic sophisticated, retro-futuristic enamel signage, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use high contrast, bold negative space, and geometric patterns reminiscent of Art Deco celestial maps. The overall mood is majestic and mysterious. Highly detailed, clean vector art, print-ready, high resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, dirty, photographic, photo-realistic, fuzzy
